content_body: The focus of the Blue Ridge Wine & Jazz Festival is for the North Georgia Mountains to be recognized as “A Cultural Tourism Destination”, to feature regional wines being produced locally, provide financial support and opportunities for area students of Jazz music, and awareness to the community as to the importance of this legendary American music style. Every summer, this festival brings together jazz and wine enthusiasts for a lovely opportunity to experience some of the finest things in life.
title: Blue Ridge Wine and Jazz Festival
